parameters.query: WITH candidates AS(SELECT t.id FROM drama.tts_generation_tasks t LEFT JOIN drama.dialogue_audio a ON a.dialogue_id=t.dialogue_id AND a.generation_version=t.generation_version AND a.is_current WHERE((t.status='processing'AND(t.next_poll_at IS NULL OR t.next_poll_at<=now()))OR(t.status='succeeded'AND a.auto_qc_status='pending'))AND($1::text IS NULL OR t.task_id=$1)AND($2::text IS NULL OR t.project_id=$2)ORDER BY t.next_poll_at NULLS FIRST,t.created_at LIMIT $3 FOR UPDATE OF t SKIP LOCKED),claimed AS(UPDATE drama.tts_generation_tasks t SET next_poll_at=now()+make_interval(secs=>$4)FROM candidates c WHERE t.id=c.id RETURNING t.*)SELECT * FROM claimed;

nodes.name: Claim Due Audio Tasks SKIP LOCKED

parameters.jsCode: const t=$('Switch Audio Poll Route').item.json,s=String($json.status||'processing').toLowerCase(),done=['succeeded','completed','success'].includes(s),failed=['failed','error','cancelled'].includes(s),a=$json.audio||$json,url=a?.url||a?.audio_url;if(done&&(!url||/^data:/i.test(url)||a.base64||a.audio_base64))throw new Error('TTS_PROVIDER_INVALID_RESPONSE: completed task must return URL, never base64');return [{json:{...t,new_status:done?'succeeded':failed?'failed':'processing',new_poll_count:Number(t.poll_count)+1,result:{success:!failed,provider:t.provider,model:t.model,mode:'async',provider_task_id:t.provider_task_id,status:done?'succeeded':failed?'failed':'processing',audio:done?{url,original_url:url,storage_url:a.storage_url||null,format:a.format||t.request_payload.format||'wav',duration_ms:Number(a.duration_ms||a.duration*1000||0)||null,sample_rate:Number(a.sample_rate||t.request_payload.sample_rate||48000),channels:Number(a.channels||1),bitrate:Number(a.bitrate||0)||null,content_hash:a.content_hash||null}:null,usage:{characters:[...String(t.request_payload.text||'')].length,estimated_cost:Number($json.usage?.estimated_cost||t.estimated_cost||0)},warnings:Array.isArray($json.warnings)?$json.warnings:[],error:failed?{code:'TTS_PROVIDER_INVALID_RESPONSE',message:String($json.error?.message||$json.error||'provider failed'),retryable:false}:null,task_id:t.task_id}}}];

const x=$json,wait=Number($env.TTS_MAX_WAIT_MINUTES||10)*60000,expired=!x.started_at||Date.now()-new Date(x.started_at).getTime()>wait;if(x.new_status==='processing'&&(x.new_poll_count>=Number(x.max_poll_count)||expired)){x.new_status='timeout';x.result={...x.result,success:false,status:'timeout',error:{code:'TTS_TASK_TIMEOUT',message:'poll count or wait limit exceeded',retryable:false}}}return [{json:x}];

const path=require('path'),crypto=require('crypto'),x=$json,r=x.request_payload||{},a=x.result.audio||{},safe=v=>String(v).replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9_-]/g,'_'),base=$env.MEDIA_STORAGE_PATH||'/data/storage',dir=path.join(base,'dialogue-audio',safe(x.project_id),safe(x.episode_id),safe(x.dialogue_id)),file='audio_'+safe(x.dialogue_id)+'_v'+x.generation_version+'_processed.wav',target=a.storage_url&&String(a.storage_url).startsWith(base)?String(a.storage_url):path.join(dir,file),download=!(a.storage_url&&String(a.storage_url).startsWith(base)),ffmpeg=String($env.FFMPEG_PATH||'ffmpeg'),ffprobe=String($env.FFPROBE_PATH||'ffprobe');if(!/^[A-Za-z0-9_./-]+$/.test(ffmpeg)||!/^[A-Za-z0-9_./-]+$/.test(ffprobe))throw new Error('AUDIO_FILE_INVALID: unsafe media tool path');if(download&&!/^https?:\/\//i.test(String(a.url||'')))throw new Error('AUDIO_DOWNLOAD_FAILED: provider URL is not http(s)');const q=v=>"'"+String(v).replace(/'/g,"'\\''")+"'",parts=['set -eu','mkdir -p '+q(dir)];if(download){parts.push('url='+q(String(a.url)));parts.push(q(ffmpeg)+' -y -v error -i "$url" -vn -ac 1 -ar '+Number(r.sample_rate||48000)+' -af '+q('loudnorm=I='+Number($env.TTS_TARGET_LOUDNESS_LUFS||-16)+':TP='+Number($env.TTS_MAX_PEAK_DB||-1)+':LRA=11')+' '+q(target+'.tmp.wav'));parts.push('mv '+q(target+'.tmp.wav')+' '+q(target));}parts.push(q(ffprobe)+' -v error -show_entries format=duration,size,format_name:stream=codec_name,sample_rate,channels,bit_rate -of json '+q(target));parts.push(q(ffmpeg)+' -hide_banner -nostats -i '+q(target)+' -af '+q('ebur128=peak=true,silencedetect=noise=-50dB:d=0.3')+' -f null -');const job_key=[x.project_id,x.dialogue_id,x.generation_version,'probe_audio',target].join(':'),job_id='mediajob_'+crypto.createHash('sha1').update(job_key).digest('hex').slice(0,20);return [{json:{...x,audio_target_path:target,audio_original_url:a.original_url||a.url,audio_public_url:a.url,media_job_id:job_id,media_job_key:job_key,media_command:parts.join('; ')}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO drama.media_processing_jobs(job_id,idempotency_key,project_id,episode_id,entity_type,entity_id,operation,input_url,output_url,parameters,status,started_at)VALUES($1,$2,$3,$4,'dialogue_audio',$5,'probe_audio',$6,$7,jsonb_build_object('task_id',$8::text,'generation_version',$9::int),'processing',now())ON CONFLICT(idempotency_key)DO UPDATE SET status=CASE WHEN drama.media_processing_jobs.status IN('failed','timeout')THEN'processing'ELSE drama.media_processing_jobs.status END,error_code=NULL,error_message=NULL,started_at=CASE WHEN drama.media_processing_jobs.status IN('failed','timeout')THEN now()ELSE drama.media_processing_jobs.started_at END RETURNING $10::jsonb request;

end=i===parts.length-1?duration:Math.max(cursor+1,Math.round(duration*weights.slice(0,i+1).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/total)),id='sub_'+crypto.createHash('sha1').update(x.dialogue_id+':'+x.generation_version+':'+(i+1)).digest('hex').slice(0,20),z={subtitle_cue_id:id,sequence_number:i+1,text:v.trim(),start_ms:cursor,end_ms:end,duration_ms:end-cursor};cursor=end;return failed automatic nodes.name: Parse FFprobe QC and Align Subtitles

parameters.query: WITH t AS(UPDATE drama.tts_generation_tasks SET status=$1,poll_count=$2,response_payload=$3::jsonb,next_poll_at=NULL,completed_at=now(),error_code=$4,error_message=$5 WHERE task_id=$6 RETURNING *),dup AS(SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.dialogue_audio o WHERE o.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND o.dialogue_id<>(SELECT dialogue_id FROM t)AND o.is_current AND o.content_hash=$17 AND $17 IS NOT NULL)duplicate),a AS(UPDATE drama.dialogue_audio SET original_url=$7,storage_url=$8,format=$9,sample_rate=$10,channels=$11,bitrate=$12,actual_duration_ms=$13,loudness_lufs=$14,peak_db=$15,silence_ratio=$16,content_hash=$17,status=$1,auto_qc_status=CASE WHEN $18='passed'AND(SELECT duplicate FROM dup)THEN'warning'ELSE $18 END,auto_qc_report=jsonb_set(jsonb_set($19::jsonb,'{checks,content_hash_duplicate}',to_jsonb((SELECT duplicate FROM dup)),true),'{warnings}',coalesce($19::jsonb->'warnings','[]'::jsonb)||CASE WHEN(SELECT duplicate FROM dup)THEN'["content_hash_duplicate"]'::jsonb ELSE'[]'::jsonb END,true)WHERE dialogue_id=(SELECT dialogue_id FROM t)AND generation_version=(SELECT generation_version FROM t)RETURNING *),sc AS(INSERT INTO drama.subtitle_cues(subtitle_cue_id,project_id,episode_id,scene_id,shot_id,dialogue_id,dialogue_audio_id,sequence_number,speaker_name,text,start_ms,end_ms,duration_ms,style_config,status)SELECT z.subtitle_cue_id,a.project_id,a.episode_id,a.scene_id,$20,a.dialogue_id,a.dialogue_audio_id,z.sequence_number,$21,z.text,z.start_ms,z.end_ms,z.duration_ms,$22::jsonb,'aligned'FROM a CROSS JOIN jsonb_to_recordset($23::jsonb)z(subtitle_cue_id text,sequence_number int,text text,start_ms int,end_ms int,duration_ms int)WHERE $1='succeeded'ON CONFLICT(dialogue_audio_id,sequence_number)DO UPDATE SET text=excluded.text,start_ms=excluded.start_ms,end_ms=excluded.end_ms,duration_ms=excluded.duration_ms,style_config=excluded.style_config,status='aligned'),rv AS(INSERT INTO drama.review_tasks(review_id,project_id,stage,entity_type,entity_id,review_status,metadata)SELECT 'review_'||substr(md5(a.dialogue_audio_id),1,20),a.project_id,'dialogue_audio','dialogue_audio',a.dialogue_audio_id,'pending',jsonb_build_object('dialogue_id',a.dialogue_id,'generation_version',a.generation_version,'auto_qc_status',a.auto_qc_status)FROM a WHERE $1='succeeded'ON CONFLICT(review_id)DO NOTHING),mj AS(UPDATE drama.media_processing_jobs SET status=CASE WHEN $1='succeeded'THEN'succeeded'ELSE'failed'END,output_url=$8,error_code=$4,error_message=$5,completed_at=now()WHERE job_id=$24),pl AS(UPDATE drama.episode_audio_plans p SET status='ready'WHERE p.episode_id=(SELECT episode_id FROM t)AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.dialogues d WHERE d.episode_id=p.episode_id AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.dialogue_audio da WHERE da.dialogue_id=d.dialogue_id AND da.is_current AND da.status='succeeded'AND da.auto_qc_status IN('passed','warning')))RETURNING p.episode_id),flags AS(SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pl)audio_ready,($1::text IN('failed','timeout')OR $18::text='failed')audio_failed,EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.storyboard_images i WHERE i.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND i.is_current AND i.review_status='approved')AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.storyboard_images i WHERE i.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND i.is_current AND i.review_status='approved'AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.shot_videos v WHERE v.shot_id=i.shot_id AND v.is_current AND v.review_status='approved'))AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_scripts es WHERE es.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND es.status='approved')AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_scripts es JOIN drama.dialogues d ON d.episode_id=es.episode_id WHERE es.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND es.status='approved'AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.dialogue_audio da WHERE da.dialogue_id=d.dialogue_id AND da.is_current AND da.status='succeeded'AND da.auto_qc_status IN('passed','warning')))AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_scripts es WHERE es.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND es.status='approved'AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_audio_plans ap WHERE ap.episode_id=es.episode_id AND ap.status='ready'))full_done),next_state AS(SELECT p.project_id,CASE WHEN f.full_done THEN'stage_4_completed'WHEN f.audio_failed THEN'stage_4_failed'WHEN p.current_stage NOT IN('video_processing','shot_video_review','shot_videos_generated','shot_videos_approved')AND f.audio_ready THEN'audio_ready'ELSE p.current_stage END next_stage,CASE WHEN f.full_done THEN'stage_4_completed'WHEN f.audio_failed THEN'stage_4_failed'WHEN p.current_stage NOT IN('video_processing','shot_video_review','shot_videos_generated','shot_videos_approved')AND f.audio_ready THEN'audio_ready'ELSE p.status END next_status FROM drama.projects p CROSS JOIN flags f WHERE p.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)),pupd AS(UPDATE drama.projects p SET current_stage=n.next_stage,status=n.next_status,error_message=CASE WHEN n.next_stage='stage_4_failed'THEN coalesce($5::text,'audio poll or processing failed')WHEN n.next_stage IN('stage_4_completed','audio_ready')THEN NULL ELSE p.error_message END FROM next_state n WHERE p.project_id=n.project_id RETURNING p.project_id)SELECT(SELECT task_id FROM t)task_id;

nodes.name: Save Processed Audio QC and Subtitles

parameters.query: WITH t AS(UPDATE drama.tts_generation_tasks SET status=$1,poll_count=$2,response_payload=$3::jsonb,next_poll_at=CASE WHEN $1='processing'THEN now()+make_interval(secs=>$4)ELSE NULL END,completed_at=CASE WHEN $1 IN('failed','timeout')THEN now()ELSE completed_at END,error_code=$5,error_message=$6 WHERE task_id=$7 RETURNING *),a AS(UPDATE drama.dialogue_audio SET status=CASE WHEN $1='processing'THEN'processing'WHEN $1='timeout'THEN'timeout'ELSE'failed'END,auto_qc_status=CASE WHEN $1 IN('failed','timeout')THEN'failed'ELSE auto_qc_status END,auto_qc_report=CASE WHEN $1 IN('failed','timeout')THEN jsonb_build_object('status','failed','error_code',$5,'error_message',$6)ELSE auto_qc_report END WHERE dialogue_id=(SELECT dialogue_id FROM t)AND generation_version=(SELECT generation_version FROM t)),mj AS(UPDATE drama.media_processing_jobs SET status='failed',error_code=$5,error_message=$6,completed_at=now()WHERE entity_type='dialogue_audio'AND entity_id=(SELECT dialogue_id FROM t)AND status='processing' RETURNING job_id),pupd AS(UPDATE drama.projects p SET current_stage='stage_4_failed',status='stage_4_failed',error_message=coalesce($6::text,'audio poll or processing failed')FROM t WHERE p.project_id=t.project_id AND $1 IN('failed','timeout')RETURNING p.project_id)SELECT task_id,status FROM t;

parameters.jsCode: let t={};try{t=$('Loop Claimed Audio Tasks').item.json||{};}catch(e){}const m=$json.error?.message||$json.message||'audio poll or processing failed',code=/download/i.test(m)?'AUDIO_DOWNLOAD_FAILED':/ffprobe|audio|media|command/i.test(m)?'AUDIO_FILE_INVALID':/timeout/i.test(m)?'TTS_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT':'TTS_PROVIDER_INVALID_RESPONSE';return [{json:{...t,new_status:'failed',new_poll_count:Number(t.poll_count||0)+1,result:{success:false,provider:t.provider||null,model:t.model||null,status:'failed',audio:null,error:{code,message:m,retryable:/timeout|network|5\d\d/i.test(m)},task_id:t.task_id||null}}}];
